urgent_methodology: Publisher-marked Breaking, Urgent, Alert, Just in, Developing or similar items are collected first and receive priority over standard items, unless they are liveblogs, programme previews or low-value content.

latest.title: White House teleprompter operator accused of making $100k off Trump speech bets
latest.summary: Gabriel Perez is accused of placing bets on words the president would use during major public addresses. The Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) has been informed of the activity by Kalshi, the prediction markets platform.
latest.details: Gabriel Perez is accused of placing bets on words the president would use during major public addresses. The Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) has been informed of the activity by Kalshi, the prediction markets platform. Kalshi froze Perez's account before he could withdraw any profits, which amounted to over $90,000. White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt confirmed that Perez is now on unpaid leave and will no longer work at the White House.
latest.full_brief: Gabriel Perez is accused of placing bets on words the president would use during major public addresses. The Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) has been informed of the activity by Kalshi, the prediction markets platform. Kalshi froze Perez's account before he could withdraw any profits, which amounted to over $90,000. White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt confirmed that Perez is now on unpaid leave and will no longer work at the White House.

latest.title: At least one dead in Texas floods ravaging same area where campers died
latest.summary: At least one person has died due to flooding in central Texas, an area previously affected by severe floods last summer. The National Weather Service has reported that the Guadalupe River is experiencing "large and deadly" flooding following heavy rain.
latest.details: At least one person has died due to flooding in central Texas, an area previously affected by severe floods last summer. The National Weather Service has reported that the Guadalupe River is experiencing "large and deadly" flooding following heavy rain. Texas Governor Greg Abbott stated that approximately 80 rescues have been made in the region. The flooding has prompted emergency officials to encourage residents to evacuate to safety.
latest.full_brief: At least one person has died due to flooding in central Texas, an area previously affected by severe floods last summer. The National Weather Service has reported that the Guadalupe River is experiencing "large and deadly" flooding following heavy rain. Texas Governor Greg Abbott stated that approximately 80 rescues have been made in the region. The flooding has prompted emergency officials to encourage residents to evacuate to safety.

latest.title: Zelensky's removal of popular defence minister sparks protests in Ukraine
latest.summary: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky's decision to replace Defence Minister Mykhailo Fedorov has led to protests and expressions of anger from civil society. Maj-Gen Yevhenii Khmara has been named as the acting defence minister following Fedorov's removal.
latest.details: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky's decision to replace Defence Minister Mykhailo Fedorov has led to protests and expressions of anger from civil society. Maj-Gen Yevhenii Khmara has been named as the acting defence minister following Fedorov's removal. Fedorov himself confirmed that tensions existed between him and Commander-in-Chief Oleksandr Syrskyi. Zelensky acknowledged that the conflict between the General Staff and the defence ministry was systemic.
latest.full_brief: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky's decision to replace Defence Minister Mykhailo Fedorov has led to protests and expressions of anger from civil society. Maj-Gen Yevhenii Khmara has been named as the acting defence minister following Fedorov's removal. Fedorov himself confirmed that tensions existed between him and Commander-in-Chief Oleksandr Syrskyi. Zelensky acknowledged that the conflict between the General Staff and the defence ministry was systemic.

latest.title: Iran targets military bases as US launches wave of strikes
latest.summary: Tehran has launched new attacks on US military bases in Gulf states, while the US has conducted strikes on multiple sites across Iran. The US military stated that these strikes aimed to degrade Iran's ability to threaten maritime safety in the Strait of Hormuz.
latest.details: Tehran has launched new attacks on US military bases in Gulf states, while the US has conducted strikes on multiple sites across Iran. The US military stated that these strikes aimed to degrade Iran's ability to threaten maritime safety in the Strait of Hormuz. Iran's foreign ministry reported that a children's cancer treatment center was evacuated due to nearby strikes. The US has resumed a blockade on Iranian ports, which had been lifted as part of a previous agreement.
latest.full_brief: Tehran has launched new attacks on US military bases in Gulf states, while the US has conducted strikes on multiple sites across Iran. The US military stated that these strikes aimed to degrade Iran's ability to threaten maritime safety in the Strait of Hormuz. Iran's foreign ministry reported that a children's cancer treatment center was evacuated due to nearby strikes. The US has resumed a blockade on Iranian ports, which had been lifted as part of a previous agreement.

latest.title: JD Vance says Welsh castle was 'coolest thing I've ever seen'
latest.summary: JD Vance expressed his admiration for Caernarfon Castle, calling it the "coolest thing I've ever seen" during a visit in 2013. He noted the castle's historical significance, contrasting it with buildings in the US.
latest.details: JD Vance expressed his admiration for Caernarfon Castle, calling it the "coolest thing I've ever seen" during a visit in 2013. He noted the castle's historical significance, contrasting it with buildings in the US. Vance's experiences in the UK provided him with a new perspective on life and marriage. He and his wife engaged in typical vacation activities, including visiting local pubs and exploring other castles.

latest.title: ‘We are waiting with bated breath’: Super El Niño forecast could make 2027 hottest year on…
latest.summary: The Bureau of Meteorology in Australia has warned that the current El Niño could become the strongest on record. Climatologists are closely monitoring the situation, as a strong El Niño may lead to the hottest year on record in 2027.
latest.details: The Bureau of Meteorology in Australia has warned that the current El Niño could become the strongest on record. Climatologists are closely monitoring the situation, as a strong El Niño may lead to the hottest year on record in 2027. The phenomenon is characterized by warmer sea surface temperatures in the tropical Pacific, which can lead to severe weather patterns. Current models suggest that this El Niño could peak at temperatures significantly higher than previous events.
latest.full_brief: The Bureau of Meteorology in Australia has warned that the current El Niño could become the strongest on record. Climatologists are closely monitoring the situation, as a strong El Niño may lead to the hottest year on record in 2027. The phenomenon is characterized by warmer sea surface temperatures in the tropical Pacific, which can lead to severe weather patterns. Current models suggest that this El Niño could peak at temperatures significantly higher than previous events.

latest.title: Air quality plummets in 20 states as smoke from Canadian wildfires spreads across the US
latest.summary: Air quality has deteriorated across 20 states in the US due to smoke from Canadian wildfires, prompting health alerts for millions of residents. The smoke has caused Toronto's air quality to rank among the worst globally, and it has spread to states as far as New York and Minnesota.
latest.details: Air quality has deteriorated across 20 states in the US due to smoke from Canadian wildfires, prompting health alerts for millions of residents. The smoke has caused Toronto's air quality to rank among the worst globally, and it has spread to states as far as New York and Minnesota. NASA reported that winds have carried the smoke southeast, affecting large areas and altering the sky's appearance. Officials have urged residents in affected areas to limit outdoor activities and take precautions against the unhealthy air conditions.
latest.full_brief: Air quality has deteriorated across 20 states in the US due to smoke from Canadian wildfires, prompting health alerts for millions of residents. The smoke has caused Toronto's air quality to rank among the worst globally, and it has spread to states as far as New York and Minnesota. NASA reported that winds have carried the smoke southeast, affecting large areas and altering the sky's appearance. Officials have urged residents in affected areas to limit outdoor activities and take precautions against the unhealthy air conditions.

latest.title: 'A true miracle of destiny' - Messi and Lamine Yamal's incredible first meeting
latest.summary: Lionel Messi and Lamine Yamal are set to meet on the field for the first time during the World Cup final, despite their age difference of 20 years. Their first encounter occurred in 2007 when Messi was a rising star and Yamal was just a baby.
latest.details: Lionel Messi and Lamine Yamal are set to meet on the field for the first time during the World Cup final, despite their age difference of 20 years. Their first encounter occurred in 2007 when Messi was a rising star and Yamal was just a baby. A series of photographs from that meeting have resurfaced, highlighting the serendipitous connection between the two players. Yamal's family won a competition to have their baby photographed with a Barcelona player, leading to this remarkable moment in football history.
latest.full_brief: Lionel Messi and Lamine Yamal are set to meet on the field for the first time during the World Cup final, despite their age difference of 20 years. Their first encounter occurred in 2007 when Messi was a rising star and Yamal was just a baby. A series of photographs from that meeting have resurfaced, highlighting the serendipitous connection between the two players. Yamal's family won a competition to have their baby photographed with a Barcelona player, leading to this remarkable moment in football history.

latest.title: Chip giant TSMC pledges another $100bn to expand US production
latest.summary: Taiwanese chipmaker TSMC plans to invest an additional $100 billion in Arizona to expand its production capabilities in the US. This investment is expected to create tens of thousands of jobs and raises TSMC's total commitment to the US to $265 billion.
latest.details: Taiwanese chipmaker TSMC plans to invest an additional $100 billion in Arizona to expand its production capabilities in the US. This investment is expected to create tens of thousands of jobs and raises TSMC's total commitment to the US to $265 billion. The company reported a 77% increase in net profits for the second quarter, reaching $22 billion. TSMC's chips are crucial for advanced technologies, including AI data centers and smart devices.
latest.full_brief: Taiwanese chipmaker TSMC plans to invest an additional $100 billion in Arizona to expand its production capabilities in the US. This investment is expected to create tens of thousands of jobs and raises TSMC's total commitment to the US to $265 billion. The company reported a 77% increase in net profits for the second quarter, reaching $22 billion. TSMC's chips are crucial for advanced technologies, including AI data centers and smart devices.

latest.title: Moment US Navy jet stuns packed Florida beach with low flypast
latest.summary: A US Navy Blue Angels jet performed a low flypast over Pensacola Beach, Florida, during an air show, startling beachgoers. The incident caused beach umbrellas and other items to be blown away, but no injuries were reported.
latest.details: A US Navy Blue Angels jet performed a low flypast over Pensacola Beach, Florida, during an air show, startling beachgoers. The incident caused beach umbrellas and other items to be blown away, but no injuries were reported. Officials from the Blue Angels are reviewing the situation after the aircraft flew lower than standard profiles. One beachgoer described the experience as "amazing" despite the disturbance.
latest.full_brief: A US Navy Blue Angels jet performed a low flypast over Pensacola Beach, Florida, during an air show, startling beachgoers. The incident caused beach umbrellas and other items to be blown away, but no injuries were reported. Officials from the Blue Angels are reviewing the situation after the aircraft flew lower than standard profiles. One beachgoer described the experience as "amazing" despite the disturbance.

brief_methodology.pl: Komentarz powstaje wyłącznie z przeczytanego tekstu artykułu. Musi przejść niezależny przegląd AI oraz pełną kontrolę językową; surowy tekst artykułu lub RSS nie może być komentarzem awaryjnym.
brief_methodology.en: A comment is created only from the retrieved article text. It must pass an independent AI review and the complete language gate; raw article or RSS text is never a fallback comment.

comment_quality_gate.pl: Publikowany jest wyłącznie komentarz utworzony z tekstu artykułu, zatwierdzony w niezależnym przeglądzie AI i przyjęty w całości przez rygorystyczną kontrolę językową. Jedno wadliwe zdanie odrzuca cały komentarz.
comment_quality_gate.en: Only an article-derived comment approved by an independent AI review and accepted in full by the strict language gate is published. One defective sentence rejects the whole comment.

same_story_dedupe.rule: One underlying event gets one homepage card, even if multiple publishers cover it with different links.
